title: Plugin Store
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to remove this plugin?
update_failed: Update failed, please try again later
confirm_delete_theme: Are you sure you want to remove this theme?
download_success: Download successful! You can apply it in the themes list
permStorageDesc: Allow local storage access for plugin data
permDataReadDesc: Allow reading records, accounts, debts, categories, etc.
permDataWriteDesc: Allow adding or modifying records, debts, contacts
permUIDesc: Allow registering pages, showing notifications, home widgets
permNetworkDesc: Allow communication with external servers (e.g., exchange rates)
permCameraDesc: Allow using camera to scan barcodes or read images
noSpecialPermissions: This plugin does not declare any special permissions.
newPermissions: This update adds the following permissions
requestPermissions: This plugin will request the following permissions
hashMismatch: Plugin file integrity check failed: SHA-256 hash mismatch
removed: Plugin removed, please refresh the page
sandboxDeniedPermission: Permission Denied: This plugin does not have the "{{label}}" permission to call context.{{group}}.{{prop}}()
sandboxDeniedNetwork: Permission Denied: This plugin does not have the "Network Access" permission to use {{api}}()
sandboxDeniedNetwork2: Permission Denied: This plugin does not have the "Network Access" permission
sandboxDeniedIndexedDB: Access Denied: IndexedDB is not allowed in plugins.
sandboxDeniedFunction: Access Denied: Function constructor is not allowed in plugins.
sandboxDeniedEval: Access Denied: eval() is not allowed in plugins.
sandboxDeniedOverwrite: Access Denied: Cannot overwrite global storage
iframeLoadFailed: Plugin {{name}} iframe failed to load, falling back to legacy sandbox
tampered: Plugin "{{name}}" has been tampered with, loading aborted
